text.title: JPA / Hibernate Examples
text.summary: User entity with correct associations, repository with JOIN FETCH and search query, @DataJpaTest slice.

example.note: Business-key equals on email. LAZY fetch. @Version. Explicit @Column. Index declared on entity.
JOIN FETCH only where needed. @Modifying with clearAutomatically. Pageable search with nullable filters.
@DataJpaTest slices to JPA layer. replace = NONE forces Testcontainers instead of in-memory H2.
